result:
Here's a summary of all changes made to implement the Redo feature for the reviewer:

## Files Changed

### 1. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/Collection.kt`
- Added `redoLabel()` method - returns localized label like "Redo Answer Card" using `tr.undoRedoAction()`
- Added `redoAvailable()` method - checks if redo is available via `undoStatus().redo`

### 2. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Undo.kt`
- Added `import com.ichi2.libanki.redo`
- Added `redoAndShowSnackbar()` function - mirrors `undoAndShowSnackbar()`, calls the backend's `redo()` and shows a snackbar with the result

### 3. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AbstractFlashcardViewer.kt`
- Added `redo()` method - mirrors `undo()`, calls `redoAndShowSnackbar()` with the reviewer's snackbar duration
- Added `ViewerCommand.REDO` handling in `executeCommand()` - calls `redo()` when the REDO command is invoked

### 4. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt`
- Added `R.id.action_redo` click handler in `onOptionsItemSelected()` - calls `redo()`
- Added redo button configuration in `onCreateOptionsMenu()` - enables/disables the redo icon based on `redoAvailable()`, sets appropriate title/label and alpha

### 5. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`
- Added `REDO(R.string.redo)` enum constant
- Added default key binding: `Shift+Z` and `Y` (matching desktop Anki)

### 6. `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/reviewer/ActionButtonStatus.kt`
- Added `setupButton` call for `R.id.action_redo` with `"customButtonRedo"` preference key and `SHOW_AS_ACTION_ALWAYS` default

### 7. `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/menu/reviewer.xml`
- Added `action_redo` menu item with `ic_redo_white` icon, disabled by default, using `RtlCompliantActionProvider`

### 8. `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/01-core.xml`
- Added `<string name="redo">Redo</string>` string resource

### 9. `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/drawable/ic_redo_white.xml` (NEW)
- Created redo icon (standard Material Design redo arrow, mirrored version of the undo icon)

## Design Notes

- The implementation mirrors the existing undo pattern throughout the codebase
- The backend already had `Collection.redo()` and `UndoStatus.redo` support - we just needed the UI layer
- The redo button appears in the toolbar next to undo, is enabled only when redo is available
- Keyboard shortcut `Shift+Z` and `Y` match desktop Anki behavior
- The redo action goes through the same `undoableOp` infrastructure as undo, ensuring proper change notification to subscribers
